# Ipe Fixture Corpus

Place project-owned `.ipe` XML fixtures here. Prefer small files that exercise
one feature each:

- line and polyline paths
- closed polygons and fill rules
- circle, ellipse, and arc paths
- cubic Beziers and splines
- text labels and minipages
- groups, clipping, layers, and views
- stylesheet colors, pens, opacity, and dash styles

Do not copy Ipe repository artwork, stylesheets, or examples into this folder.
